## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Evidence and limits

- Official source links:
- Material scope differences or exceptions:
- Review status:
- Last verified date:

## Checklist

- [ ] I used current authoritative sources.
- [ ] I did not treat theme similarity as legal equivalence.
- [ ] I did not copy restricted standards, paywalled text, or unlicensed translations.
- [ ] I manually checked any AI-assisted research.
- [ ] `pnpm validate:data`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm test` pass.
